title: Njan Ninnodu Koodeyundu
overview: Damanan and Madanan are thieves, who have been trying to pull off a good burglary. The break-in they plan goes downhill and the duo jump into a river in an attempt to escape. They lose consciousness while swimming, but both see a dream in which they are washed ashore in a land sans commercialization.
